### Student

**Yu Yi** 2023 Control Engineering

**Lin Zhisong** 2024 Electrical Engineering

**Huang Jiaxin** 2024 Control Engineering

**Chen Ziliang** 2025 Electrical Engineering

**Zhu Sijin** 2025 Electrical Engineering

**Lan Zhiran** 2025 Electronic Information

**Tang Sibo** 2026 Electronic Information

**Wang Jinyuan** 2026 Electrical Engineering
